CreateJob.documentation: API used to create a job that is associated to a workspace. This does not execute the job.
CreateJob.name: CreateJob

DeleteJob.documentation: API used to delete an existing job and all related data.
DeleteJob.name: DeleteJob

DeleteSelfRoleMappings.documentation: Removes a caller user from the workspace (self-removal).
DeleteSelfRoleMappings.name: DeleteSelfRoleMappings

DeleteUserRoleMappings.documentation: Removes a target user from a workspace. The target user cannot be the caller.
DeleteUserRoleMappings.name: DeleteUserRoleMappings

GetJob.documentation: API used to get details about a job.
GetJob.name: GetJob

ListAgents.documentation: Lists agents available for the specified account.
ListAgents.name: ListAgents

ListIamRoleAssignments.documentation: Lists IAM role assignments for the calling user. Self-scoped: userId is extracted from the bearer token.
ListIamRoleAssignments.name: ListIamRoleAssignments

ListJobPlanSteps.documentation: This API can be used to either list all the job plan steps, top-level steps only, or steps under a parent step.
ListJobPlanSteps.name: ListJobPlanSteps

ListJobs.documentation: API used to list jobs within a workspace.
ListJobs.name: ListJobs

ListPlanUpdates.documentation: API used to list updates that have been made to the job plan since the timestamp passed in the request.
ListPlanUpdates.name: ListPlanUpdates

StartJob.documentation: API used to invoke the orchestrator agent, which starts the execution of a job.
StartJob.name: StartJob

StopJob.documentation: API used to stop the execution of a job.
StopJob.name: StopJob

UpdateJob.documentation: This API is called to update the objective and/or name associated with an already created job.
UpdateJob.name: UpdateJob

AccountId.documentation: Represents the AWS account ID of the customer

visibility.documentation: Agent visibility status configured by the partner

storedInAtxBucket.documentation: Whether the artifact is stored in an ATX-managed bucket

ArtifactIdentifier.documentation: Identifies an artifact by either a UUID or an S3 object key

errorCode.documentation: A code representing the type of error encountered

messageId.documentation: An identifier for the message that encountered an error during retrieval

messageIds.documentation: A list of identifiers for messages being requested

workspaceId.documentation: used to perform AuthZ based on workspaceId in the chat.

errors.documentation: A list of errors encountered during the batch retrieval operation

messages.documentation: A list of messages retrieved successfully, returned in the order requested

CategoryType.documentation: The categoryType refers to the context or purpose of the data within a workflow

dashboardId.documentation: Dashboard ID for retrieving the generated content

executionPlanId.documentation: Optional. Plan this job is executing a step of.

CustomEvent.documentation: CustomEvent should be treated as a union, meaning exactly one member should be populated. However, we use a structure here due to a limiation of Smithy Event Streams: A @streaming Union (SendMessageOutputStream) must contain only structure types. https://smithy.io/2.0/spec/streaming.html#event-streams

connectorId.documentation: A connector can be assigned only to one workspace

workspaceId.documentation: This is the workspace with the connector, the workspace is not deleted, only the connector is deleted

ExecutionPlanFilter.documentation: Filter results to jobs belonging to a specific execution plan.

FilePath.documentation: Complete file path including directory and filename. Accepts any valid UTF-8 string per S3 object key constraints. Max length is constrained to satisfy 1024 S3 character limit with consideration for the internal file path structure

FolderPath.documentation: S3 safe path with mandatory trailing slash and no leading slash

includeObjective.documentation: If set to true, the objective will be included in the response.

planStepId.documentation: jobPlanStep that HITL task is associated to

tag.documentation: Idenfitifer to chain or group different Hitl tasks together

title.documentation: title to display in project plan, e.g.

IamRoleAssignment.documentation: Represents a single IAM role assignment for a user

createdAt.documentation: Timestamp when the role assignment was created

roleArn.documentation: The IAM role ARN assigned to the user

updatedAt.documentation: Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated

interactionOriginId.documentation: The origin message for which the interaction result should be stored

executionPlanId.documentation: Plan this job belongs to. Null for non-plan jobs.

parentStepId.documentation: Will be set to 'root' if the entry corresponds to a top-level step.

score.documentation: Generated in platform to determine ordering of steps

jobType.documentation: The job type to filter on; across the workspaces

agentConfigurationAvailability.documentation: Optional field to filter by runtime configuration status

taskType.documentation: Define the type of tasks returned. HITL will only return NORMAL tasks or DASHBOARD tasks

parentStepId.documentation: If not specified, we return all steps. If specified as root, we return only top-level steps. Otherwise, we return steps only under the parentId

executionPlanFilter.documentation: Filter results to jobs belonging to a specific execution plan.

roleFilters.documentation: Filter results by role type. Limited to max length 5 (i.e. the number of possible role types)

parentStepId.documentation: Will be set to 'root' if the entry corresponds to a top-level step.

messageType.documentation: Indicates the processing status and the category of this message

roles.documentation: Currently only supporting users having one role at a time.

RunFinishedEvent.documentation: Signals end of turn — no more events will be emitted for this request

runErrorEvent.documentation: Indicates an error occurred during stream processing

runFinishedEvent.documentation: Indicates the stream has completed successfully — signals end of turn

textMessageContentEvent.documentation: Progressive text content tokens for the assistant's response

textMessageStartEvent.documentation: Signals the start of a new assistant text message

toolCallEndEvent.documentation: Signals the completion of a tool call

toolCallStartEvent.documentation: Signals the start of a tool call

message.documentation: The message object corresponding to the message that was sent by the caller.

expectedPlanArtifact.documentation: Optimistic concurrency check. Must match the plan's current planArtifact. Null when attaching artifact to a newly created plan (planArtifact is null).
